com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class StatusInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.StatusInfo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable

    public class StatusInfo
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable
    Provides status details of the scanner
    Since:
    API 1

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  StatusInfo.StatusCondition
      Scanner status condition

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      StatusInfo.StatusCondition isAdfOutputBinFull()
      Returns whether ADF output bin is full or not
      boolean isBusy()
      Returns whether scanner is busy or not
      boolean isOnline()
      Returns whether scanner service is online or not on a printer
      StatusInfo.StatusCondition isPaperInAdf()
      Returns whether paper placed in ADF or not
      StatusInfo.StatusCondition isPaperInFlatbed()
      Returns whether paper placed in Flatbed or not

    • Method Detail

      • isOnline

        public boolean isOnline()
        Returns whether scanner service is online or not on a printer
        Returns:
        true if online
        Since:
        API 1

      • isBusy

        public boolean isBusy()
        Returns whether scanner is busy or not
        Returns:
        true if busy
        Since:
        API 1

      • isAdfOutputBinFull

        public StatusInfo.StatusCondition isAdfOutputBinFull()
        Returns whether ADF output bin is full or not
        Returns:
        true if full
        Since:
        API 1

      • isPaperInAdf

        public StatusInfo.StatusCondition isPaperInAdf()
        Returns whether paper placed in ADF or not
        Returns:
        true if paper presents in ADF
        Since:
        API 1

      • isPaperInFlatbed

        public StatusInfo.StatusCondition isPaperInFlatbed()
        Returns whether paper placed in Flatbed or not
        Returns:
        true if paper presents in Flatbed
        Since:
        API 1
